name: project-drawdown
title: Project Drawdown Climate Solutions
description: Ranked table of ~150 climate solutions analysed by Project Drawdown, a leading research organisation that identifies and models the most effective ways to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. Each solution includes its sector, implementation mode, estimated GHG impact (Gt CO₂-eq per year over a 100-year horizon), cost, and co-benefits. Solutions are classified as Highly Recommended, Worthwhile, Keep Watching, or Not Recommended.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Verb describing the solution type (e.g. Deploy, Improve, Protect)

fields.name: solution_classification
fields.description: Project Drawdown ranking: Highly Recommended, Worthwhile, Keep Watching, or Not Recommended

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Implementation approach: Cut Emissions, Remove Carbon, or both

fields.name: sector
fields.description: Industry or domain (Electricity, Transportation, Buildings & Industry, FALO & Nature-Based Carbon Removal, etc.)

fields.name: adoption_unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement for deployment of this solution

fields.name: effectiveness_tco2eq_per_unit
fields.description: CO₂-equivalent reduction per unit of adoption over 100 years (t CO₂-eq)

fields.name: adoption_achievable_range
fields.description: Range of achievable future deployment by 2050

fields.name: ghg_impact_gt_co2eq_yr
fields.description: Estimated total GHG impact in gigatons of CO₂-equivalent per year over 100 years (range)

fields.name: cost_usd_per_t_co2eq
fields.description: Net cost in USD per tonne of CO₂-equivalent reduced. Negative values indicate net savings.

fields.name: climate_pollutants_mitigated
fields.description: Greenhouse gases targeted (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, F-gases, BC)

fields.name: speed_of_action
fields.description: Implementation timeline: Emergency Brake (immediate), Gradual, or Delayed

views.name: solutions-by-sector
views.title: Climate Solutions by Sector and Classification
